message:
feat: ACCM metrics dashboard + NPS cache fix (#5855)

Add ACCM (AI Codebase Maturity Model) section to /analytics page:
- Weekly PR & Issue activity chart (stacked bar)
- AI vs Human contributions (stacked area) with KPI cards
- CI workflow pass rates (Coverage Suite + Nightly Compliance)
- Contributor growth (new per week + cumulative)

New /api/analytics-accm Netlify Function fetches from GitHub API
with 1-hour caching via Netlify Blobs.

Also fix NPS section not rendering due to browser caching empty
response — added cache-busting query param.

Addresses #5844 (daily activity chart).

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
